---
title: "Pipeline Architecture"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.pipeline-diagram {
  max-width: 780px;
  margin: 0 auto 3rem;
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
}

.phase-label {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: #6c757d;
  margin: 2rem 0 0.5rem;
  padding-left: 4px;
}

.pipe-node {
  position: relative;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1rem 1.4rem;
  margin: 0.6rem 0;
  color: #fff;
  text-align: center;
}

.pipe-node h4 {
  margin: 0 0 0.25rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
}

.pipe-node p {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  opacity: 0.85;
}

.pipe-node .output-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  border-radius: 3px;
  padding: 1px 7px;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-family: monospace;
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
}

/* Node colours */
.node-read    { background: #2d6a4f; }
.node-data    { background: #4a6741; }
.node-rep     { background: #7b6b3a; }
.node-extend  { background: #1b6b5a; }
.node-extend-alt { background: #0e5c4a; }
.node-diag    { background: #8b6914; }
.node-report  { background: #1b6b5a; }
.node-gate    { background: #b44d2d; }
.node-referee { background: #4a3f8a; }
.node-synth   { background: #1b6b5a; }
.node-revision{ background: #7b6b3a; }
.node-final   { background: #1b6b5a; }
.node-output  { background: #2d6a4f; border: 2px solid #52b788; }

/* Arrows */
.arrow {
  text-align: center;
  color: #adb5bd;
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 0.15rem 0;
}

/* Side annotations */
.annotation-right {
  position: absolute;
  right: -170px;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: #e07a5f;
  font-style: italic;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.annotation-left {
  position: absolute;
  left: -130px;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: #e07a5f;
  font-style: italic;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* Branch container */
.branch-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 0.6rem 0;
}

.branch-row .pipe-node {
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 230px;
  margin: 0;
}

/* Referee row */
.referee-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 0.6rem 0;
}

.referee-row .pipe-node {
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 220px;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0.8rem 0.6rem;
}

.referee-row .pipe-node h4 {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.referee-row .pipe-node p {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
}

/* Isolation banner */
.isolation-banner {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: #6c757d;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  margin: 0.4rem 0 0.2rem;
  font-style: italic;
}

/* OR divider */
.or-divider {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  margin: 0.3rem 0;
}
.or-divider::before, .or-divider::after {
  content: "";
  flex: 1;
  height: 1px;
  background: #dee2e6;
}
.or-divider span {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #6c757d;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* Loop arrow */
.loop-annotation {
  text-align: left;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: #e07a5f;
  font-style: italic;
  margin: 0.3rem 0 0.3rem 1rem;
}
</style>

<div class="pipeline-diagram">

  <div class="phase-label">Phase 1 · Intelligence</div>

  <div class="pipe-node node-read">
    <h4>Paper Intelligence Agent</h4>
    <p>Reads the PDF, extracts identification strategy, variables, specifications</p>
    <span class="output-tag">→ paper_spec.json</span>
    <span class="annotation-right">spec mismatch → fix & re-run</span>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="pipe-node node-data">
    <h4>Data Agent</h4>
    <p>Merges raw .dta/.csv files, constructs variables, applies sample filters</p>
    <span class="output-tag">→ dataset.parquet</span>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="phase-label">Phase 2 · Analysis</div>

  <div class="pipe-node node-rep">
    <h4>Replication Agent</h4>
    <p>OLS / IV / 2SLS — reproduces the original paper's main table</p>
    <span class="output-tag">→ replication_check.json</span>
    <span class="output-tag">→ table_replication.tex</span>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="or-divider"><span>/recast or /recast-cf</span></div>

  <div class="branch-row">
    <div class="pipe-node node-extend">
      <h4>DML Extension</h4>
      <p>DoubleML PLIV / PLR<br>RF + Lasso learners<br>GATE heterogeneity</p>
      <span class="output-tag">→ dml_results.json</span>
      <span class="annotation-right" style="right:-140px;">N learners</span>
    </div>
    <div class="pipe-node node-extend-alt">
      <h4>Causal Forest</h4>
      <p>CausalForestDML / CausalIVForest<br>Individual CATEs<br>Feature importances</p>
      <span class="output-tag">→ causal_forest_results.json</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="pipe-node node-diag">
    <h4>Diagnostics Agent</h4>
    <p>Replication tolerance · nuisance R² · CI coverage · CATE plausibility · SE sanity check</p>
    <span class="output-tag">→ diagnostics_flags.json</span>
    <span class="annotation-right">critical flag → hard fail</span>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="pipe-node node-report">
    <h4>Report Agent</h4>
    <p>Compiles LaTeX paper with tables, figures, and interpretation</p>
    <span class="output-tag">→ paper.tex → paper.pdf</span>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="phase-label">Phase 3 · Review</div>

  <div class="pipe-node node-gate">
    <h4>Advisor Gate · 3 independent checks</h4>
    <p>Code audit · Identification validity · Data quality — all must pass</p>
    <span class="annotation-left">hard fail → stop</span>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="isolation-banner">independent · same draft · no shared context</div>

  <div class="referee-row">
    <div class="pipe-node node-referee">
      <h4>Referee 1</h4>
      <p>Identification<br>Estimand validity<br>Instrument strength</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pipe-node node-referee">
      <h4>Referee 2</h4>
      <p>DML / CF mechanics<br>Learner choice<br>SE plausibility</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pipe-node node-referee">
      <h4>Referee 3</h4>
      <p>Robustness<br>Table replication<br>Sensitivity checks</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="pipe-node node-synth">
    <h4>Synthesis Referee</h4>
    <p>Deduplicates · ranks severity · flags disagreements</p>
    <span class="output-tag">→ synthesis.md</span>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="loop-annotation">↻ re-loop if blocking issues remain (max 3 rounds)</div>

  <div class="pipe-node node-revision">
    <h4>Revision Agent</h4>
    <p>Edits paper.tex directly · patches notebooks if blocking · writes changelog</p>
    <span class="output-tag">→ changelog_N.md</span>
    <span class="annotation-right">RERUN_NEEDED → /stage 4</span>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="phase-label">Phase 4 · Output</div>

  <div class="pipe-node node-final">
    <h4>Final Referee · human-readable report</h4>
    <p>Remaining issues · severity table · key numbers comparison · recommendation</p>
    <span class="output-tag">→ final_report.md</span>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow">↓</div>

  <div class="branch-row">
    <div class="pipe-node node-output">
      <h4>Quarto report</h4>
      <p>/publish → website</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pipe-node node-output">
      <h4>Referee reader report</h4>
      <p>final_report.md</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

This diagram shows the full RECAST pipeline from paper ingestion to published output.
**Left path annotations** (red) show failure modes. **Right path annotations** show
feedback loops and re-run triggers.

The pipeline runs one of two extension methods depending on the command:

- **`/recast`** → DoubleML (PLIV/PLR) with learner comparison and GATE analysis
- **`/recast-cf`** → Causal Forest with individual CATEs and feature importances

Both paths share the same replication stage (1–3), diagnostics, and review loop.
